selections.name: Marsept
selections.reason: Top stable (Hawkes) and Jye McNeil riding. Excellent run fresh when 2nd at Caulfield. Gets a nice weight allowance here and should be very hard to beat.

selections.name: Harry De Lad
selections.reason: Consistent type who has been in the money when fresh before. Solid speed figures and looks a strong top-three proposition.

selections.name: Upolu
selections.reason: Finished off last campaign with a solid 4th at this track. Has plenty of scope for improvement this time in work.

selections.name: The Botany Frog
selections.reason: Resumes from a spell after an okay 4th on debut. Better for that experience and can improve.

danger_horse.name: Varadero
danger_horse.reason: First starter who won a recent jump-out here. Capable of a strong run on debut.

selections.name: Sayalero
selections.reason: Resuming off a break. Had a good debut in a strong race at Caulfield. Trialed well recently and looks a top chance.

selections.name: Pursuit
selections.reason: Maher stable first starter. Won a Cranbourne jump-out recently and must be respected on debut.

selections.name: Stoneflight
selections.reason: Hayes stable debutant. Won a Flemington jump-out and has the right profile to run well.

selections.name: Lady Of Power
selections.reason: McEvoy stable first starter. Won a Flemington jump-out and sure to have admirers.

danger_horse.name: She's Buoyant
danger_horse.reason: First starter by All Too Hard. Ran 3rd in a jump-out and could surprise at odds.

selections.name: Geeseven
selections.reason: Resuming from a lengthy break. Ran a good 2nd on debut in a small field. Top stable and should be primed for this.

selections.name: Royal Maximus
selections.reason: Waller stable first starter. Has had three recent trials prior to this debut. Runner-up in a Flemington jump-out.

selections.name: Strangethingdesire
selections.reason: Hawkes stable debutant. Has had six trials prior to this debut. Worth keeping safe.

selections.name: Money Wheel
selections.reason: Consistent placegetter who has been in the money when fresh before. Definite top-three contender.

danger_horse.name: Back Of The Boat
danger_horse.reason: Made some headway two starts back. Has the ability to be in the finish if he brings his best.

selections.name: Kiwi Jenni
selections.reason: Resumes racing after a long spell. Excellent 2nd on debut when making significant ground. Maher stable should have her ready.

selections.name: Soldier Boi
selections.reason: Resumes from a spell. Bold performance expected after a good 5th on debut at this track.

selections.name: King Kalakaua
selections.reason: Maher stable runner who can improve sharply on his first two runs. Watch market.

selections.name: Le Plus Rapide
selections.reason: Placed last start on a heavy track. Will prove tough to stave off if he repeats that effort.

danger_horse.name: Tarnation
danger_horse.reason: First starter by Almanzor. Has had six trials and has the right profile for a good debut.

selections.name: Eternal
selections.reason: Waller stable runner who won well two back. Needed the run last start and should bounce back strongly here.

selections.name: Hot Chips
selections.reason: Won well last start at Cranbourne. Consistent type who has no reason not to salute again.

selections.name: Yoomee Wonder
selections.reason: Won last start at Ararat. Will be winding up strongly and is a major threat.

selections.name: Time Bandit
selections.reason: Down in class here. Can improve on recent runs and shouldn't be dismissed.

danger_horse.name: Into You
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a big finish on her day. Don't write her off completely.

selections.name: Love Symbol
selections.reason: Good 2nd last start at this track. Fitter now and making headway. Will take beating.

selections.name: Podargoni
selections.reason: Consistent type who ran a good 3rd two back. Nice draw and worth thought.

selections.name: Albanian I Am
selections.reason: Resuming. Good form last prep and can run well fresh. Can figure in the finish.

selections.name: Dantooine
selections.reason: Placed last start and is a consistent type. Leading contender coming out of a very nice draw.

danger_horse.name: Brutalina
danger_horse.reason: Progressing well and a win is on the cards. Inside draw helps.

selections.name: Justique
selections.reason: Won well on debut at this track. Good 4th last start in a stronger race. Genuine contender in this suitable contest.

selections.name: Easy Dun
selections.reason: John Allen takes over the ride. Good form and sure to run well here.

selections.name: Birdie Time
selections.reason: Hayes stable runner. Needed the first run back and will be much fitter now. Excellent winning chance.

selections.name: Zeaction
selections.reason: Consistent form and gets a run here. Can figure in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Move The Torana
danger_horse.reason: Recent form is sound. In the mix again.

selections.name: Mrs Iglesia
selections.reason: Good 2nd last start at Ballarat. Hayes stable has her racing well. Leading player.

selections.name: Southern Crescent
selections.reason: Consistent mare who won two back. Well placed here and should prove hard to beat.

selections.name: Wingsandpropellers
selections.reason: Won well last start at Stawell. Drawn to advantage and looks a solid chance.

selections.name: Ballynacally
selections.reason: Good form last prep and can run well fresh. Should be right in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Barbaric Lad
danger_horse.reason: Has placed previously when first up. Expect a bold showing fresh.
